entity: Jalen Brunson 2024-25 clutch scoring (won the NBA Clutch Player of the Year): 157 derived clutch points across 22 games with clutch scoring
notes: Clutch points are DERIVED from play-by-play score deltas (last 5 min of Q4/OT, margin within 5 before the event) because the warehouse's clutch tables are empty. NBA.com's official figure for Brunson is within a couple of points (definition edge cases: events exactly at margin boundaries); this fixture pins OUR derivation so refactors of the window logic can't silently change it. Brunson winning 2024-25 Clutch Player of the Year corroborates the ranking.
